title: 40 Ziplock Bags – 1Gallon Large Freezer Bags – Resealable Slider zip – Stand and Fill Expandable Bottom – Freezer and Microwave Safe, Heavy Duty BPA Free Plastic
features: AN EXCELLENT CHOICE: Tired of always having to throw away tons of leftovers because of improper storage conditions? Would you like to safely store your favourite smoothie fruits and veggies all year round? The Caterserve slider zipper bags are the way to go!

TOP QUALITY MATERIAL: These food storage bags are made with premium quality, food-grade non-BPA plastic, being 100% safe and allowing no flavour transfer. Don’t need to worry about weird smells, phthalates or dangerous toxins as well!
EXPANDABLE BOTTOM: These resealable food bags feature an innovative stand and fill expandable bottom, being ideal for home use, catering businesses, restaurants and more!

HIGHLY DURABLE & SEALABLE: With an enhanced durability, freezer and microwave safe design, a fresh seal for super protection and fully sealable zipper, these freezer bags are ideal for safely storing your leftovers, meat, fruits, veggies or baby food!

EXTRA LARGE CAPACITY: These gallon large zipper bags come in packs of 20 for a convenient deal value. With 3.8L capacity, measuring 26.8cm x 24.4cm x 6.9cm, these food bags will cover all your food storing needs!

Effortless Freshness with Easy Slider Seal Keep your fruits and vegetables fresh for longer with our Caterserve Easy Slider Seal bags. Designed for convenience, these bags feature an easy-to-use slider that ensures an airtight seal every time. Perfect for storing strawberries, salads, and more, these bags make meal prep and storage a breeze Ultimate Protection with Leak Proof Technology Say goodbye to spills and leaks with our Caterserve Leak Proof bags. Ideal for liquids and other perishable items, these bags provide a secure, airtight seal that keeps your food fresh and your fridge mess-free. Durable and reusable, they are perfect for both freezer and fridge storage. Effortless Cleaning for Reusable Bags Keep your food storage hygienic with our Caterserve Reusable Bags. Easily washable and durable, these bags can be cleaned with a simple rinse or run through the dishwasher, making them a convenient and Sustainable option for daily use. Perfect for fruits, vegetables, and other perishables. Expandable Gusset for Extra Capacity Maximize your storage space with our Caterserve Bags featuring an expandable gusset. These bags offer additional capacity, making them ideal for bulkier items and meal prep. The expandable design ensures a secure seal while accommodating more, making your kitchen storage more efficient and versatile Previous page Organized Pantry Store and organize pantry essentials with Caterserve bags. Perfect for keeping snacks. Freezer Safe Keep your frozen vegetables fresh with Caterserve bags. Ideal for peas, carrots, and frozen foods. Microwave Safe Our bags are microwave safe, making reheating and defrosting easy to microwave foods safely. Next page 1 Pantry Storage 2 Freezer Storage 3 Microwave Safe Snack and Lunch Storage Keep snacks and lunches fresh with Caterserve bags. Ideal for sandwiches and carrot sticks. Secure seal prevents spills and keeps food fresh. Travel Essentials Organised Store toiletries, cosmetics, and accessories neatly with Caterserve bags. Perfect for travel. Transparent design is great for security checks. Freshness for Fruits Keep fruits and veggies fresh with Caterserve bags. Perfect for strawberries, peaches, and more. Airtight seal maintains freshness and flavour. Organised Toys and Accessories Store toys, accessories, and small items neatly with Caterserve bags. Ideal for reducing clutter and keeping things organised. Durable and reusable.
